title: Student Programme Coordinator
description:
📍 Central / East Singapore
🕒 Full-Time

Make a real difference in a child’s day — every day.

We are a well-established non-profit organisation serving children and families from diverse backgrounds across Singapore. Our student care centres provide a safe, structured, and nurturing environment for children aged 7–12, supporting them academically, emotionally, and socially after school.

If you enjoy working with children, can manage energy and structure at the same time, and want meaningful work beyond just “clocking hours” — this role is for you.

What You’ll Do

1. Child Care & Safety

  • Escort children safely from school to the centre (walking distance)

  • Ensure proper hygiene, meals, rest time, and safe conduct

  • Supervise daily routines and enforce centre rules

  • Provide basic first aid and coordinate medical attention when needed

  • Conduct simple physical activities and exercises

  • Ensure children are safely handed over to parents at day’s end

2. Emotional & Social Development

  • Be a positive role model — children watch more than they listen

  • Guide behaviour, values, and social etiquette

  • Support children emotionally and listen when they are upset

  • Build confidence, resilience, and a positive self-image

  • Work closely with parents and volunteers to support each child

3. Academic Support & Enrichment

  • Supervise and guide daily homework

  • Coach children in subjects they struggle with

  • Run enrichment activities (art, music, creative learning)

  • Encourage curiosity and help children discover their strengths

4. Centre Operations

  • Help keep the centre clean, organised, and running smoothly

  • Support ad-hoc duties assigned by the Centre Head

What We’re Looking For

  • Minimum O-Level qualification

  • At least 1 year of experience working with children

  • Comfortable using IT tools for teaching and administration

  • Patient, attentive, and able to manage large groups of children

  • Able to work well under pressure in a fast-paced environment

  • Positive attitude, dependable, and team-oriented

Why Join Us

  • Meaningful work with real social impact

  • Stable, full-time role in a structured environment

  • Supportive team culture

  • Medical & dental benefits provided.


    📩 Interested applicants, please send your updated CV and availability.

    People Profilers Pte Ltd

Here at People Profilers, we pride ourselves on being a one-stop human capital solutions provider for your organisation. Our innovative and relationship-focused workforce solutions have been provided across a wide range of industries.
